title: OpenAI GPT-5.1 now available as a Databricks-hosted model
body:
Mosaic AI Model Serving now supports OpenAI [GPT-5.1](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis/supported-models#openai-gpt-5-1) as a Databricks-hosted model. You can access this model using,

* [Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token](/aws/en/machine-learning/foundation-model-apis#token-foundation-apis)
  + [Query reasoning models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-reason-models)
  + [Query vision models](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/query-vision-models)
* [Batch inference workloads using AI Functions](/aws/en/large-language-models/ai-functions)

ref_links.text: Batch inference workloads using AI Functions
